title: But what exactly are world models?
summary: Julia Turc's video examines world models by distinguishing two main schools of thought: generative and predictive approaches. It covers three primary application categories: synthetic data generation, interactive environments, and autonomous agents. The video features examples from NVIDIA, Meta, Wayve, Google, and others.
